channel.title: OceanCloud - Microsoft 365 & SharePoint News
channel.description: The latest Microsoft 365 and SharePoint news, roadmap updates, and expert commentary from OceanCloud - Microsoft Solutions Partner.

item.title: OneDrive: New Shortcuts folder option when adding shortcuts
item.dc:creator: Microsoft M365 Roadmap
item.description: OneDrive makes it easy to add shortcuts to the files and folders you use most. Now you can choose to keep those shortcuts neatly together in one place instead of mixed.

item.title: Microsoft Purview: Information Protection - Rights Management connector - Certificate-based authentication
item.dc:creator: Microsoft M365 Roadmap
item.description: The Microsoft Rights Management connector is moving from shared-secret authentication to certificate-based authentication, improving its security posture.

item.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention - AI Powered Data Loss Prevention Policy Optimizer
item.dc:creator: Microsoft M365 Roadmap
item.description: DLP Policy Optimizer uses AI to analyze your organization's DLP policies, rule structure, and activity signals to identify optimization opportunities.

item.title: Microsoft Teams: New layout when sharing content for Teams events
item.dc:creator: Microsoft M365 Roadmap
item.description: Microsoft Teams events are getting a new layout when sharing content, improving the presenter and attendee experience for event production.

item.title: Microsoft Teams: Manage Built-in Teams agents in the Teams admin center
item.dc:creator: Microsoft M365 Roadmap
item.description: Teams admins will be able to manage built-in Teams agents from the Teams admin center, giving IT more control over tenant agent availability.

item.title: Microsoft Teams: Inline search in compose box
item.dc:creator: Microsoft M365 Roadmap
item.description: Microsoft Teams is adding inline search in the compose box so users can find and insert relevant content without leaving the message flow.

item.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Copilot suggested rename
item.dc:creator: Microsoft M365 Roadmap
item.description: Microsoft 365 Copilot is adding suggested rename support to help users give files and content clearer names based on context.

item.title: SharePoint Showcase: From Chaos to AI-Ready with the SharePoint Admin Agent
item.dc:creator: Microsoft SharePoint Blog
item.description: The SharePoint Admin Agent helps organizations move from content chaos to AI-ready information architecture and governance.

item.title: Microsoft Purview: Insider Risk Management - Unified alert queue
item.dc:creator: Microsoft M365 Roadmap
item.description: Microsoft Purview Insider Risk Management is adding a unified alert queue to help investigators review and prioritize alerts more efficiently.

item.title: Microsoft Purview: Insider Risk Management - Expanding note capabilities across alerts & cases
item.dc:creator: Microsoft M365 Roadmap
item.description: Microsoft Purview Insider Risk Management is expanding note capabilities across alerts and cases for better investigation context.

item.title: Microsoft Purview: Insider Risk Management - Enhanced user profile in IRM alerts
item.dc:creator: Microsoft M365 Roadmap
item.description: Microsoft Purview Insider Risk Management is enhancing the user profile in IRM alerts to give investigators more useful context.

item.title: Outlook: All Accounts view (Unified Inbox) brings your email into a single inbox view
item.dc:creator: Microsoft M365 Roadmap
item.description: Outlook is adding an All Accounts view that brings email from multiple accounts into a single unified inbox experience.

item.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Support for MCP Agents with Interactive UI Widgets in Government Clouds
item.dc:creator: Microsoft M365 Roadmap
item.description: Microsoft 365 Copilot is adding support for MCP agents with interactive UI widgets in government clouds.

item.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): MCP-Based Agent Enablement for U.S. Government Clouds
item.dc:creator: Microsoft M365 Roadmap
item.description: Microsoft 365 Copilot is enabling MCP-based agents for U.S. Government Clouds.

item.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Chat History Filtering by Copilot Experience
item.dc:creator: Microsoft M365 Roadmap
item.description: Microsoft 365 Copilot is adding chat history filtering by Copilot experience so users can focus on the conversations that matter.
